title: China-Italy Double Tax Treaty 2026: FAQs for Italian Investors - China Briefing
summary: China-Italy Double Tax Treaty 2026: FAQs for Italian Investors China Briefing
ai_summary: This item provides FAQs for Italian investors regarding the China-Italy Double Tax Treaty, potentially focusing on the 2026 outlook or a revised agreement. It offers practical guidance on treaty provisions relevant to cross-border investment and operations between the two countries, addressing aspects like income, capital gains, and permanent establishment rules.

title: Parliament ratifies double taxation avoidance agreement with Japan - AKIpress News Agency
summary: Parliament ratifies double taxation avoidance agreement with Japan AKIpress News Agency
ai_summary: The Parliament of Kyrgyzstan has officially ratified a Double Taxation Avoidance Agreement (DTAA) with Japan. This ratification marks a significant step towards formalizing tax cooperation and aims to prevent double taxation, thereby fostering bilateral trade and investment between Kyrgyzstan and Japan.

title: Ukraine and Germany have signed a new agreement on the avoidance of double taxation - Odessa Journal
summary: Ukraine and Germany have signed a new agreement on the avoidance of double taxation Odessa Journal
ai_summary: Ukraine and Germany have formally signed a new agreement on the avoidance of double taxation. This new Double Taxation Agreement (DTA) is designed to enhance economic relations and provide greater tax certainty for businesses and investors operating between Ukraine and Germany.

title: California advances game preservation bill as digital tax debate grows - MSN
summary: California advances game preservation bill as digital tax debate grows MSN
ai_summary: California is experiencing a growing debate concerning potential digital taxation policies, alongside the advancement of a game preservation bill. The discussion likely centers on introducing new state-level taxes targeting digital services or products, reflecting broader global efforts to adapt tax systems to the digital economy.
